evidence.summary: Repository lock pins Palworld target, full UE4SS commit and the reviewed Native DLL digest.
A prior compatible process loaded dev36 and established Bridge; inventory consumption remains experimental and lacks the production persistence gate.

combinations.notes: Experimental target only. Steam build is not pinned and the Native inventory write capability has not passed the controlled save-stop-restart-relogin acceptance, so this is not production stable.

evidence.summary: Official REST reported v1.0.1.100619 and Steam build 24181105; the compatibility guard initially isolated the old dev36 loader before the separate controlled dev37-ro read-only load.

Two independent guarded builds reproduced the same 886272-byte protocol 1.1 read-only dev37-ro DLL after session-generation, absolute-deadline, and exact request-payload hash hardening, with Cargo locked and exact fetched dependency commits. Artifact reproducibility alone did not prove runtime compatibility; this exact candidate was later loaded only for a controlled read-only probe.

A controlled dev37-ro session established Bridge, but inventory.probe treated persisted offline inventories as live inventory. The candidate was superseded and quarantined; its historical bridge availability does not make it supported or stable.

combinations.notes: Historical superseded read-only candidate. A controlled runtime load found that its inventory probe did not distinguish persisted offline inventories from online players, so dev37-ro must not be redeployed. Write capabilities were disabled throughout.

evidence.summary: Two independent fresh guarded builds produced byte-identical 888320-byte protocol 1.1 read-only dev38-ro DLLs from the locked UE4SS, Unreal, Cargo, CMake, Rust, and MSVC inputs.

The exact dev38-ro DLL loaded on the current server with runtime identity verified and writes disabled. Nine read-only operations that do not require an online player succeeded; three live-player probes correctly refused because no player was online, with zero unexpected failures.

combinations.notes: Historical superseded read-only runtime candidate. The Bridge was available and persisted offline inventories were marked ownerOnline=false, but player, progression, and inventory live probes still lacked a controlled online player and independent review. It has been replaced by the dev39-ro source candidate and must not be redeployed. No write capability was advertised; this is not production stable.

evidence.summary: Two independent fresh guarded builds produced byte-identical 893440-byte protocol 1.1 read-only dev39-ro DLLs from the locked UE4SS, Unreal, Cargo, CMake, Rust, and MSVC inputs. Runtime loading and the fixed probe suite have not yet been performed for dev39-ro.

combinations.notes: Current source and artifact candidate only. Declared capabilities are read-only, but Bridge availability remains unknown until the exact dev39-ro DLL is loaded and the fixed runtime suite is collected. Controlled online-player coverage, PalDefender combination testing, independent review, and all write persistence gates remain pending; this is not production stable.
